title: Al Ristorante
gcseTheme: Theme 2: Local, National, International and Global Areas
scenario: You're ordering food at an Italian restaurant on holiday.

lines.speaker: cameriere
lines.english: Good evening! A table for two?

lines.speaker: you
lines.english: Yes, thank you. We have a reservation.

lines.speaker: cameriere
lines.italian: Ecco il vostro tavolo. Ecco il menu.
lines.english: Here is your table. Here is the menu.

lines.speaker: you
lines.english: Thank you. What do you recommend as a starter?

lines.speaker: cameriere
lines.english: The caprese salad is very good.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Prendo l'insalata. E come primo, la pasta al pomodoro.
lines.english: I'll have the salad. And as first course, pasta with tomato.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Il pollo con le patate, per favore.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Un'acqua minerale e un succo d'arancia.
lines.english: A mineral water and an orange juice.

lines.speaker: cameriere
lines.english: Very good. Would you like a dessert after?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Sì! Il gelato al cioccolato, per favore.
lines.english: Yes! The chocolate ice cream, please.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Grazie! Posso avere il conto, per favore?
lines.english: Thank you! Can I have the bill, please?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Ecco. Il cibo era molto buono!
lines.english: Here you go. The food was very good!

practicePrompts.prompt: How would you ask for the bill?
practicePrompts.answer: Posso avere il conto, per favore?

practicePrompts.prompt: How would you order a pizza?
How would you ask what the waiter recommends?
